text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” Trump speaking to reporters outside the White House, responding to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Trump on the Islamabad talks: "Whether we make a deal or not makes no difference to me." He claims the US is currently sweeping the strait for mines laid by "water dropper" while his Vice President is currently in Pakistan negotiating. "We're opening up the strait even though we don't use it, for other countries that are afraid, or weak, or cheap." NATO, he says, was no help. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 ‘如果中国那样做，中国将会有大麻烦。’ 特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应有关中国准备向伊朗运送便携式防空系统（MANPADS）的报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体……” 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 特朗普谈及伊斯兰堡会谈：“我们是否达成协议对我来说没有区别。” 他声称美国目前正在海峡扫除由“投水者”布设的水雷，而他的副总统目前正在巴基斯坦进行谈判。“我们正在开放海峡，尽管我们自己不用，但这是为了其他害怕、软弱或吝啬的国家。” 他说，北约没有提供任何帮助。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iran's Embassy in Austria to Hegseth: “ It may not win him the next war, but at least he'll show up in the right place.”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗驻奥地利大使馆对赫格塞斯（Hegseth）表示：“这可能无法让他赢得下一场战争，但至少他会出现在正确的地方。”

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Iranian source to CNN: — Iran says it is not in a hurry and warns that until a framework is agreed, the current restrictions remain - agreed ship numbers will not be allowed through . — Source adds: If U.S. negotiators fail to act realistically, the Strait stays closed. Iran has demonstrated its capability, and continued miscalculation will harm the U.S.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗消息人士告诉CNN：——伊朗表示并不着急，并警告称在达成框架协议之前，目前的限制措施依然有效——未经同意的船只数量将不被允许通过。——消息人士补充道：如果美国谈判代表不能采取务实的行动，海峡将保持关闭。伊朗已经展示了其能力，持续的误判将损害美国。

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” Trump speaking to reporters outside the White House, responding to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 “如果中国那样做，中国将会有大麻烦。” 特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应有关中国准备向伊朗运送便携式防空系统（MANPADS）的报道。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 No major shift in negotiations so far — Tasnim reporter in Islamabad — Source: Talks stalled for hours due to U.S. excessive demands, while some Western media are overstating optimism to influence energy prices. — Despite early expert-level progress, no significant change yet, the Strait of Hormuz and other issues remain key points of dispute.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 谈判目前没有重大转变——塔斯尼姆通讯社（Tasnim）驻伊斯兰堡记者——消息来源：由于美国提出过分要求，会谈陷入僵局数小时，而一些西方媒体为了影响能源价格正在夸大乐观情绪。——尽管专家层面的早期进展，但目前还没有重大变化，霍尔木兹海峡和其他问题仍然是争议的焦点。

text: "The prevailing feeling currently is that Iran is winning economically and controlling the Strait of Hormuz, collecting fees from ships." Former Pentagon analyst Michael Maloof: Trump was very surprised by the level of Iranian resistance. Iran is waging asymmetric war, it cannot confront plane for plane or missile for missile, so it resorted to other methods the United States could not adapt to. Trump says "this situation must not continue," but the situation continues and he has taken no vital steps. He's looking for an exit but doesn't want to create conditions that will cause negotiators to walk out. Meanwhile, Vance is dealing with experienced Iranian negotiators like Qalibaf, who adopts hardline positions protecting his country's interests. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: “目前普遍的感觉是，伊朗在经济上正在获胜，并控制着霍尔木兹海峡，向船只收取费用。” 前五角大楼分析师迈克尔·马卢夫（Michael Maloof）：特朗普对伊朗抵抗的程度感到非常惊讶。伊朗正在进行非对称战争，它无法在飞机对飞机或导弹对导弹的层面上进行对抗，因此它采取了美国无法适应的其他方法。特朗普说“这种情况不能继续下去”，但情况仍在继续，他没有采取任何关键步骤。他正在寻找出路，但不想制造导致谈判代表退出的条件。与此同时，万斯（Vance）正在与像卡利巴夫（Qalibaf）这样经验丰富的伊朗谈判代表打交道，后者采取强硬立场以保护其国家利益。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Open Source Intel China is preparing to send air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks, including MANPADS routed through a third party to mask their origin, according to CNN, citing intelligence assessments. Trump warns China will face "big problems" if it sends weapons to Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：据CNN援引情报评估称，中国准备在未来几周内向伊朗运送防空系统，包括通过第三方转运以掩盖其来源的便携式防空系统（MANPADS）。特朗普警告称，如果中国向伊朗运送武器，将面临“大麻烦”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 - 开源情报推文

text: OSINTdefender Speaking to reporters outside the White House, U.S. President Donald J. Trump responded to reports that China is preparing to send man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) to Iran, saying “If China does that, China’s going to have big problems.” President Trump is set to visit China this upcoming month. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在白宫外对记者发表讲话，回应了有关中国准备向伊朗运送便携式防空系统（MANPADS）的报道，称“如果中国那样做，中国将会有大麻烦。” 特朗普总统计划于下个月访问中国。推文

text: OSINTdefender According to CNN, citing people familiar with intelligence assessments on the matter, China is preparing to send air defense systems to Iran in the coming weeks. Per the report, China is preparing to send Man-portable air-defense systems (MANPADS) through a third party to mask the origin of the weapons. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：据CNN援引熟悉此事情报评估的人士称，中国准备在未来几周内向伊朗运送防空系统。据报道，中国准备通过第三方运送便携式防空系统（MANPADS），以掩盖武器的来源。推文

text: Open Source Intel Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about opening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Are they reopening it? Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043075133632393547/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：记者：伊朗没有听从你关于开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。他们会重新开放吗？特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043075133632393547/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "We're in very deep negotiations with Iran. We win regardless. We've defeated them militarily... Whether we make a deal or not, it makes no difference to me, and the reason is because we've won, whether you listen to the Fake News or not." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043074437914796365/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普：“我们正在与伊朗进行非常深入的谈判。无论如何我们都会赢。我们在军事上击败了他们……无论我们是否达成协议，对我来说都没有区别，原因是我们已经赢了，不管你是否听信假新闻。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043074437914796365/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "They have no navy. They have no radar. They have no air force. Their leaders are all dead. Khamenei is gone. For many years he ruled; he's gone. With all of that, let's see what happens, but from my standpoint, I don't care." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043073824132944022/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普：“他们没有海军。他们没有雷达。他们没有空军。他们的领导人都死了。哈梅内伊已经不在了。多年来他一直统治着；他已经不在了。有了这一切，让我们看看会发生什么，但从我的立场来看，我不在乎。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043073824132944022/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel IRGC Navy claims full control over the Strait of Hormuz. It says only merchant vessels complying with its regulations will be allowed to pass, warning that any foreign warship attempting transit will face a severe response. The statement also denies reports that U.S. Navy destroyers passed through the strait earlier today. NOW 🔴 IRAN’S IRGC: Any military vessel attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will face a “strong response.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）海军声称完全控制了霍尔木兹海峡。它表示只有遵守其规定的商船才被允许通过，并警告任何试图过境的外国军舰都将面临严厉回应。该声明还否认了有关美国海军驱逐舰今天早些时候通过海峡的报道。现在 🔴 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：任何试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的军用船只都将面临“强硬回应”。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel NOW 🔴 IRAN’S IRGC: Any military vessel attempting to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will face a “strong response.” tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：现在 🔴 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队：任何试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的军用船只都将面临“强硬回应”。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. Navy EOD divers swept the Orion capsule for hazardous materials before extracting the Artemis II crew from the Pacific Ocean off San Diego yesterday. The operation was conducted aboard the USS John P. Murtha. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043073157918060940/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：美国海军爆炸物处理（EOD）潜水员昨天在圣地亚哥附近的太平洋海域提取“阿耳忒弥斯2号”（Artemis II）机组人员之前，对“猎户座”（Orion）太空舱进行了危险品清扫。该行动是在“约翰·P·默萨”号（USS John P. Murtha）两栖船坞运输舰上进行的。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043073157918060940/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: The Iranian Revolutionary Guards says it does not permit US ships to pass through the Strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）：突发：伊朗革命卫队表示不允许美国船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: The Iranian Revolutionary Guards warns it will deal 'decisively' with any military vessels trying to cross the Strait of Hormuz tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）：突发：伊朗革命卫队警告称，将“果断”处理任何试图穿越霍尔木兹海峡的军用船只。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: We are sweeping the strait. Whether we make a deal or not, makes no difference to me. We’ve won https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043072538868064491/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普：我们正在清扫海峡。无论我们是否达成协议，对我来说都没有区别。我们赢了。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043072538868064491/video/1 推文

text: Disclose.tv NOW - Trump: "We're negotiating whether we make a deal or not, makes no difference to me. The reason is because we've won." https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043072468806517091/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv：现在 - 特朗普：“我们正在谈判是否达成协议，对我来说没有区别。原因是我们已经赢了。” https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2043072468806517091/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Trump says the US does not use the Strait of Hormuz, but will open it because 'we have a lot of other countries in the world that do use it that are either afraid, or weak or cheap' tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）：突发：特朗普表示美国不使用霍尔木兹海峡，但会开放它，因为“世界上有很多其他国家使用它，它们要么害怕，要么软弱，要么吝啬”。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump warns China will face "big problems" if it sends weapons to Iran. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普警告称，如果中国向伊朗运送武器，将面临“大麻烦”。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071932233339065/video/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Lebanon's war death toll has risen to 2,020, according to the country's health ministry. tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）：突发：据黎巴嫩卫生部称，黎巴嫩战争死亡人数已升至2,020人。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump says tankers are surging toward the U.S. as the Strait of Hormuz remains constrained: "Boats are sailing up and heading out to our country. Big, beautiful tankers, and we're loading them up with oil and gas and everything else. It's a pretty beautiful thing to see!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071684236771510/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报（Open Source Intel）：特朗普表示，随着霍尔木兹海峡持续受限，油轮正涌向美国：“船只正在航行并前往我国。巨大、漂亮的油轮，我们正在给它们装载石油、天然气和其他一切。这真是美丽的景象！” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043071684236771510/video/1 推文

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 “We defeated Iran but we will negotiate with them!”
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 “我们击败了伊朗，但我们将与他们谈判！”

text: Reporter: Iran is not listening to your threats about reopening the Strait of Hormuz. Trump: How do you know that? Reporter: Because it’s still blocked. Trump: Why do you say that? You don’t know anything. Who are you with? Reporter: NBC News. Trump: NBC? That’s fake news.
text_zh: 记者：伊朗没有听从你关于重新开放霍尔木兹海峡的威胁。特朗普：你怎么知道？记者：因为它仍然被封锁。特朗普：你为什么这么说？你什么都不知道。你是哪家媒体的？记者：NBC新闻。特朗普：NBC？那是假新闻。

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 Senior Iran’s Navy officer: — The destroyer that tried to enter the Strait of Hormuz today is an "Arleigh Burke" class, which is the most advanced American warship. — At the same time as the destroyer's movement, Trump sent a message that the strait…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Bloomberg, quoting a regional intelligence official: Two US Navy Arleigh Burke-class destroyers attempted to pass through the Strait of Hormuz but were forced to turn back after being threatened by IRGC and a drone was launched towards the ships.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷⚡️🇮🇱🇺🇸 伊朗海军高级军官：——今天试图进入霍尔木兹海峡的驱逐舰是‘阿利·伯克’（Arleigh Burke）级，这是最先进的美国军舰。——在驱逐舰移动的同时，特朗普发出了一个信息，即海峡……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 彭博社援引一位地区情报官员的话称：两艘美国海军阿利·伯克级驱逐舰试图通过霍尔木兹海峡，但在受到伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的威胁并向船只发射无人机后被迫折返。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 Tasnim: A new round of trilateral talks between Iran, the United States and Pakistan has begun in Islamabad. The Iranian delegation includes parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi and Ali Bagheri Kani. The…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 Fars News Agency: Trilateral talks between Iran and the United States in Islamabad continue intensively, with approximately nine hours having passed since they began. Local time is now 2:21am. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇵🇰 塔斯尼姆通讯社：伊朗、美国和巴基斯坦之间的三方会谈新一轮会议已在伊斯兰堡开始。伊朗代表团包括议会议长穆罕默德·巴吉尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf）、外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Abbas Araghchi）和阿里·巴盖里·卡尼（Ali Bagheri Kani）。……” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 法尔斯通讯社（Fars News Agency）：伊朗和美国在伊斯兰堡的三方会谈仍在紧张进行，距离开始已经过去了大约九个小时。当地时间现在是凌晨2:21。@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Among the wreckage of the American HC-130J, locals have recovered an AN/AAQ-24 infrared countermeasure system installed on American SOF planes and helicopters. This dazzler automatically detects and emits a laser beam at incoming infrared guided missiles to confuse them and thus protect the aircraft. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 在美国HC-130J飞机的残骸中，当地人回收了一套安装在美国特种作战飞机和直升机上的AN/AAQ-24红外对抗系统。这种炫目器会自动探测并向来袭的红外制导导弹发射激光束，以干扰它们，从而保护飞机。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 ‘Last chance’ to reach a common framework — Tasnim
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 达成共同框架的“最后机会”——塔斯尼姆通讯社

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf met face to face and shook hands with Vice President JD Vance, a rare moment given decades of hostility. Source: NYT
text_zh: 伊朗的卡利巴夫与副总统JD·万斯（JD Vance）面对面会谈并握手，考虑到几十年的敌对状态，这是一个罕见的时刻。来源：纽约时报

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷U.S. President Trump on the ongoing negotiations in Islamabad: "Getting a lot of reports. They've been meeting for many hours as you probably have noticed. We'll see what happens. Look, regardless, we win. Regardless what happens, we win. We've…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on reports that China is sending weapons to Iran: Reporter: "Tell us that China is preparing to give weapons to Iran?" Trump: "Well, if China does that, China's gonna have big problems. Okay?" @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及伊斯兰堡正在进行的谈判：‘收到了很多报告。正如你们可能注意到的，他们已经会谈了许多小时。我们将看看会发生什么。看，无论如何，我们赢了。无论发生什么，我们都赢了。我们已经……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及有关中国向伊朗运送武器的报道：记者：“告诉我们中国是否准备向伊朗提供武器？” 特朗普：“嗯，如果中国那样做，中国将会有大麻烦。好吗？” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to ResistanceTrench mirror: "🇮🇷 IRGC Navy: Any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will be met with a harsh response Announcement No. 58, Command of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy: — The IRGC Navy fully and powerfully controls the intelligent…" 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Senior Iran’s Navy officer: — The destroyer that tried to enter the Strait of Hormuz today is an "Arleigh Burke" class, which is the most advanced American warship. — At the same time as the destroyer's movement, Trump sent a message that the strait will soon be reopened, but the IRGC vessels blocked its path and after a brief confrontation, the destroyer was forced to retreat.
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 ResistanceTrench 镜像：“🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：任何军用船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将遭到严厉回应。第58号公告，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令部：——伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军完全且有力地控制着智能……” 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 伊朗海军高级军官：——今天试图进入霍尔木兹海峡的驱逐舰是‘阿利·伯克’级，这是最先进的美国军舰。——在驱逐舰移动的同时，特朗普发出了一个信息，即海峡很快就会重新开放，但伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的船只封锁了其路径，经过短暂的对峙，驱逐舰被迫撤退。

text: IRGC Navy: Any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will face a firm response. The IRGC Navy has full authority and maintains intelligent control over the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：任何军用船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将面临坚决回应。伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军拥有完全的权力，并对霍尔木兹海峡保持智能控制。

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Professor Marandi on Al Mayadeen from Islamabad: 🔸 Iran is fully prepared to return to Tehran without an agreement 🔸 Negotiations are to show the international community and regional peoples that Iran gave a chance for de-escalation 🔸 If the US and Trump ignore Iran's rights and the rights of Palestine, Lebanon, and the Axis of Resistance, "we will prepare ourselves for war" 🔸 One thing that surprised the Iranian side: Lebanon's PM seeking normalization talks with Israel instead of stopping attacks on Lebanon — "completely irresponsible behavior" "As we won in the war, we will return." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 马兰迪（Marandi）教授在伊斯兰堡接受“广场电视台”（Al Mayadeen）采访：🔸 伊朗已做好充分准备在没有达成协议的情况下返回德黑兰 🔸 谈判是为了向国际社会和地区人民展示伊朗给了缓和局势一个机会 🔸 如果美国和特朗普无视伊朗的权利以及巴勒斯坦、黎巴嫩和抵抗轴心的权利，“我们将为战争做好准备” 🔸 伊朗方面感到惊讶的一件事：黎巴嫩总理寻求与以色列进行关系正常化谈判，而不是停止对黎巴嫩的攻击——“完全不负责任的行为” “正如我们在战争中获胜一样，我们将回归。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on the ongoing negotiations in Islamabad: "Getting a lot of reports. They've been meeting for many hours as you probably have noticed. We'll see what happens. Look, regardless, we win. Regardless what happens, we win. We've totally defeated that country. And so let's see what happens. Maybe they make a deal, maybe they don't. Is it a good time to go home? From the standpoint of America, we win. One of the things that's happening is that boats are sailing up and heading out to our country, big beautiful tankers, and we're loading them up with oil and gas and everything else. And, it's pretty beautiful thing to see." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈及伊斯兰堡正在进行的谈判：“收到了很多报告。正如你们可能注意到的，他们已经会谈了许多小时。我们将看看会发生什么。看，无论如何，我们赢了。无论发生什么，我们都赢了。我们已经彻底击败了那个国家。所以让我们看看会发生什么。也许他们会达成协议，也许不会。现在是回家的好时机吗？从美国的立场来看，我们赢了。正在发生的事情之一是船只正在航行并前往我国，巨大、漂亮的油轮，我们正在给它们装载石油、天然气和其他一切。而且，这真是美丽的景象。” @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 China’s gonna have big problems if it sends weapons to Iran — Trump
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇨🇳 如果中国向伊朗运送武器，中国将会有大麻烦——特朗普

text: Trump on China sending weapons to Iran: If China does that, China is going to have big problems.
text_zh: 特朗普谈及中国向伊朗运送武器：如果中国那样做，中国将会有大麻烦。

text: Trump: We are in very deep negotiations with Iran. We win regardless.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们正在与伊朗进行非常深入的谈判。无论如何我们都会赢。

text: 🇮🇷 IRGC Navy: Any attempt by military vessels to pass through the Strait of Hormuz will be met with a harsh response Announcement No. 58, Command of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy: — The IRGC Navy fully and powerfully controls the intelligent management of the Strait of Hormuz. — Passage is allowed only to non-military vessels under specific regulations. — Reports about American vessels passing through the strait are denied, and any attempt by military vessels to pass will be met with a firm and harsh response.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军：任何军用船只试图通过霍尔木兹海峡的行为都将遭到严厉回应。第58号公告，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军司令部：——伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队海军完全且有力地控制着霍尔木兹海峡的智能管理。——仅允许非军用船只在特定规定下通过。——关于美国船只通过海峡的报道被否认，任何军用船只试图通过的行为都将遭到坚决和严厉的回应。

text: The Spectator Index BREAKING: Trump says China 'will have big problems' if it sends arms to Iran tweet
text_zh: 观察家指数（The Spectator Index）：突发：特朗普表示如果中国向伊朗运送武器，“将会有大麻烦”。推文

text: Trump: We will open up the Strait, even though we do not use it, because we have a lot of other countries in the world that do use it that are either afraid, or weak, or cheap.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们将开放海峡，尽管我们自己不用，因为世界上有很多其他国家使用它，它们要么害怕，要么软弱，要么吝啬。

text: Trump: Whether we make a deal or not makes no difference to me.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们是否达成协议对我来说没有区别。

text: Trump: They probably have a couple of mines in the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 特朗普：他们可能在霍尔木兹海峡里放了几颗水雷。

text: Trump: Boats are sailing up and heading to our country. Big, beautiful tankers, and we are loading them up with oil and gas.
text_zh: 特朗普：船只正在航行并前往我国。巨大、漂亮的油轮，我们正在给它们装载石油和天然气。

text: Trump: We win, regardless what happens, we win. Let’s see what happens. Maybe they will make a deal, maybe they won’t. It doesn’t matter. From the standpoint of America, we win.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们赢了，无论发生什么，我们都赢了。让我们看看会发生什么。也许他们会达成协议，也许不会。这无关紧要。从美国的立场来看，我们赢了。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇸🇺🇸Hungarian Prime Minister Orban said that the U.S. provides NATO with 70% of its strength, and the U.S. supporting Hungary guaranteed their safety. "The U.S. of America has supported us. Why is this important? It is important because the USA is the…" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 Hungarian Prime Minister Orban promised Hungarians that he would end Ukraine's oil blockade on the country. "Ladies and gentlemen, the reason for this election is that a national or Ukrainian-friendly government will be formed. We will break the oil blockade against Zelensky-Hungary. open the lines again and we don't get the energy needed for the operation of the country.We will not support any decision anywhere in world politics that would benefit Ukraine, until they give up what is ours, until they open the lines again and we get the energy needed for the operation of the country. The answer to the oil blockade is a faithless blockade. We will win this battle." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇭🇺🇺🇸🇺🇸 匈牙利总理欧尔班（Orban）表示，美国为北约提供了70%的实力，美国支持匈牙利保证了他们的安全。‘美利坚合众国支持了我们。为什么这很重要？这很重要，因为美国是……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 🇭🇺 匈牙利总理欧尔班向匈牙利人承诺，他将结束乌克兰对该国的石油封锁。“女士们，先生们，这次选举的原因是将会组建一个民族政府或亲乌克兰政府。我们将打破针对泽连斯基-匈牙利的石油封锁。再次开放线路，我们没有获得国家运营所需的能源。在他们放弃属于我们的东西、再次开放线路并让我们获得国家运营所需的能源之前，我们不会在世界政治的任何地方支持任何有利于乌克兰的决定。对石油封锁的回答是背信弃义的封锁。我们将赢得这场战斗。” @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Criminal Netanyahu brags about dragging the U.S. into war with Iran: We were the first to take action because we knew what was at stake. But if I had told you a year ago that the United States of America, the most powerful power in the world, would fight alongside us, shoulder to shoulder, wing to wing, for nearly 40 days against the common enemy, who would have believed it? But all of this happened because we initiated, we acted, we attacked.
text_zh: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 罪犯内塔尼亚胡吹嘘将美国拖入与伊朗的战争：我们是第一个采取行动的人，因为我们知道利害攸关。但如果我一年前告诉你，世界上最强大的力量美利坚合众国，将与我们并肩作战，肩并肩，翼对翼，在近40天里对抗共同的敌人，谁会相信呢？但这一切之所以发生，是因为我们发起了行动，我们采取了行动，我们进行了攻击。

text: 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 ⚡ Hakan Fidan, Turkey's Foreign Minister: "Netanyahu’s current objective is to sabotage the ongoing peace negotiations. Otherwise, he would face trial in his own country and likely be sentenced to prison."
text_zh: 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 ⚡ 土耳其外交部长哈坎·菲丹（Hakan Fidan）：“内塔尼亚胡目前的目标是破坏正在进行的和平谈判。否则，他将在自己的国家面临审判，并很可能被判入狱。”

text: 💰 🇺🇸 💵 The US Dollar now represents ~46% of global FX and gold reserves, the lowest in at least 26 years. This percentage has declined -15 points since 2017. Excluding gold, the US Dollar makes up 57% of global reserve currencies, the lowest since 1994, according to IMF data. This comes as central banks have aggressively accumulated gold and diversified into other currencies. The last time the US Dollar fell below 50% of global reserves was in 1990-1991, a period marked by elevated inflation, a recession, and a crisis of confidence in the US economy. 📎 KobeissiLetter
text_zh: 💰 🇺🇸 💵 美元目前占全球外汇和黄金储备的约46%，是至少26年来的最低水平。自2017年以来，这一比例下降了15个百分点。据国际货币基金组织（IMF）数据，不包括黄金，美元占全球储备货币的57%，为1994年以来的最低水平。这是因为各国央行积极积累黄金并实现货币多元化。美元在全球储备中的占比上一次跌破50%是在1990-1991年，那是一个以高通胀、经济衰退和对美国经济信心危机为特征的时期。📎 KobeissiLetter

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷CNN: A source close to Iranian delegation in Islamabad reports that the U.S. made unacceptable demands over the Strait of Hormuz and many other issues. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN: Pakistani sources report that the overall tone and outcome of the U.S.-Iran negotiations is largely positive, but control over the Strait of Hormuz the cause of the stalemate. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇵🇰🇮🇷 CNN：接近伊朗代表团的消息人士在伊斯兰堡报告称，美国在霍尔木兹海峡和许多其他问题上提出了不可接受的要求。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 CNN：巴基斯坦消息人士报告称，美伊谈判的总体基调和结果在很大程度上是积极的，但对霍尔木兹海峡的控制是导致僵局的原因。@wfwitness
